summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P0: Invoice Payments + Automatic Invoice Status Logic. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend payment dialog, status transitions, and payment history functioning as expected.

minor.issue: Fixed: When all payments removed from invoice, status now correctly reverts to Sent/Overdue based on due date (was staying PartiallyPaid)

issues: Console warnings about HTML structure (<span> inside <tr>, <tbody>) - hydration errors logged but not affecting functionality

action_items: MINOR: Fix HTML structure in InvoiceEditorPage.js table rows to avoid hydration warnings (span elements inside tr/tbody)
critical_code_review_comments: update_invoice_status was not handling the case when all payments are removed from PartiallyPaid invoice - FIXED in finance.py line 60-67
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST- prefixed invoices during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice payments P0 feature fully tested. INV-1000 is now status=Paid with 2 payments (50 + 70 = 120). Test data with TEST- prefix cleaned up. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_invoice_payments.py cover: numbering, status transitions, direct payments, payment history, payment removal, overpayment prevention.

invoice_numbering.notes: Auto-numbering working (INV-1006 generated), settings API working

payment_validation.notes: Cannot pay Draft/Cancelled, cannot overpay, requires positive amount + account

frontend_payment_dialog.notes: Dialog shows invoice reference, amount input with quick buttons, date, method, account selection

frontend_payment_history_panel.notes: Shows payment list with date, amount, method, reference

frontend_status_badges_bulgarian.notes: Чернова, Издадена, Частично платена, Платена visible and correct
